response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled polyglot engineer with a strong web and full-stack background, but the role requires deep Java/Kotlin/JVM expertise and hands-on Spring ecosystem experience — neither of which is present in any meaningful way. Java appears briefly in two roles over a decade ago, Kotlin is absent entirely, and there is no mention of Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate anywhere in the resume. The closest IDE-adjacent experience is C/C++ work on NI LabWindows from 2014–2015. His primary expertise is TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which are orthogonal to the technical focus of this position.
strengths: Demonstrates genuine interest in developer tooling: built open-source testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and MCP code generators
Strong software craftsmanship practices — TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development — across multiple roles
Broad polyglot background with experience on complex, large-scale systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: No Kotlin experience whatsoever; Java is peripheral and only mentioned in non-JVM-centric roles over a decade ago
Zero Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience — the most critical technical requirement is entirely absent from the resume
IDE internals experience is limited to a brief C/C++ IDE role (NI LabWindows, 2014–2015) with no JVM tooling involvement
